title: CVE-2026-60137: WordPress Core SQL Injection
summary: [P1] WordPress Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability when a plugin or theme passes untrusted input to the parameter. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): none (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: SQL injection vulnerability allows arbitrary code execution

title: CVE-2026-16461: rpcbind rpcinfo Utility Buffer Overflow
summary: [P2] A stack-based buffer overflow was found in rpcbind's rpcinfo utility. This vulnerability could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code on the server. Why now: No known exploits are available (confidence: 0.80)
